core_mechanism: a metric-weighted diffusion / random-walk process governed by a Fokker-Planck equation on a curved (Riemannian) manifold, where the geometry reshapes transition rates, first-passage/escape probabilities, and the resulting spectral density
brief_reason: The abstract formulates the dynamics as a curvature-weighted random walk solved via the Fokker-Planck equation on a curved background, whose metric stretching alters escape probabilities and low/high-frequency spectral slopes.
